title: SQL Query Request
description: Request body for the Transpose SQL Analytics API endpoint.

sql.description: SQL query string against Transpose's indexed blockchain data. Tables are namespaced by chain (e.g., ethereum.nft_sales, polygon.tokens, arbitrum.transactions).
examples: SELECT * FROM ethereum.nft_sales ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT contract_address, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM ethereum.token_transfers WHERE timestamp >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY contract_address ORDER BY transfer_count DESC LIMIT 20;
